title: Having access to assets from another source (Box..)
excerpt:
Hey, 
Today the API doesn’t return assets that are not stored in monday (Dropbox, box, drive…) 
If the API can show them and even provide a pulic url to those it will be amazing

posts.author: ram_perel (Ram Perel)
posts.cookedHtml:
